# AURA50

> AURA50 is the world's first mobile-native blockchain. It brings real SHA-256 Proof-of-Work cryptocurrency mining to any Android or iOS smartphone — no ASIC hardware, no fast internet, no technical expertise required. Built for the 1.7 billion unbanked adults who access the internet only via smartphone.

## What is AURA50?

AURA50 is a from-scratch blockchain engineered for mobile devices. Unlike Bitcoin (requires 500GB+ storage, ASIC mining rigs, and broadband) or Ethereum (1TB+ storage, $5–$100 gas fees), AURA50 runs as a full node in 32MB on any phone and works on 2G networks.

The A50 token uses real SHA-256 Proof-of-Work — the same algorithm as Bitcoin — but compressed using a patent-pending temporal-spatial algorithm that achieves 31.25 million times compression (979TB → 32MB for 10 million users).

## Key Facts

- **Token**: A50
- **Max Supply**: 50,000,000 A50 (hard cap, no inflation)
- **Mining Reward**: 85% of all tokens earned by miners over 10 years
- **Block Time**: 2 minutes
- **Storage**: 32MB for a full node (vs 500GB+ for Bitcoin)
- **Bandwidth**: <50MB/month
- **Consensus**: SHA-256 Proof-of-Work (same as Bitcoin)
- **Compression**: 31.25 million× temporal-spatial algorithm
- **Networks**: Works on 2G, 3G, 4G, WiFi, and offline (queue transactions)
- **Platforms**: Android 7.0+ (API 24), iOS 14+
- **No ICO**: No pre-mine, no insider allocation
- **Halving**: Every 52,560 blocks (~1 year), like Bitcoin
- **Mainnet**: Launching Q2 2026
- **License**: Open source

## What Makes AURA50 Different

1. **Mobile Full Node** — Run a complete blockchain node on a smartphone. Impossible with Bitcoin or Ethereum.
2. **31.25 Million× Compression** — Patent-pending algorithm reduces blockchain data from 979TB to 32MB.
3. **Works on 2G** — Less than 50MB/month bandwidth. Designed for developing markets.
4. **Offline Transactions** — Queue transactions without internet. Auto-syncs when connection returns.
5. **Trust-Based Fee Decay** — Fees drop as you participate longer: 0.1% (new) → 0.001% (3+ years). World first.
6. **Hardware-Backed Security** — Keys stored in iOS Keychain / Android Keystore. Never touches servers.
7. **Fair Launch** — 85% of supply earned by miners. No ICO, no pre-mine.
8. **DAO Governance** — A50 holders vote on protocol changes. 10% quorum, 66% approval, 2-day timelock.
9. **True P2P** — libp2p with gossipsub, Kademlia DHT, NAT traversal. No central servers.

## Token Economics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Name | AURA50 (A50) |
| Max Supply | 50,000,000 |
| Miner Allocation | 85% (42,500,000 A50) |
| Block Reward (Year 1–2) | 481 A50/block |
| Block Time | 2 minutes |
| Halving Cycle | Every 52,560 blocks (~1 year) |
| Mining Period | 10 years |
| Fee System | Trust-based decay (0.001%–0.1%) |

## Comparison vs Bitcoin and Ethereum

| Feature | AURA50 | Bitcoin | Ethereum |
|---------|--------|---------|----------|
| Storage Required | 32 MB | 500+ GB | 1+ TB |
| Mobile Full Node | Yes | No | No |
| Mine on Smartphone | Yes | No | No |
| Works on 2G/3G | Yes | No | No |
| Offline Transactions | Yes | No | No |
| Transaction Fee | 0.001–0.1% | Variable $1–50+ | $5–$100+ |
| Monthly Bandwidth | <50 MB | 5–50+ GB | 20+ GB |
| Fair Launch | Yes | Yes | Pre-mine |
| Trust-Based Fees | Yes | No | No |

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is AURA50?**
AURA50 is the world's first mobile-native blockchain. It uses real SHA-256 Proof-of-Work mining — the same algorithm as Bitcoin — but engineered to run on any Android or iOS smartphone requiring only 32MB of storage and working on 2G networks.

**Can I mine A50 on my phone without special hardware?**
Yes. Any Android 7.0+ or iOS 14+ device can mine A50 tokens and earn 2–5 A50 per day. No ASIC hardware required.

**How does AURA50 fit a full blockchain in 32MB?**
AURA50 uses a patent-pending temporal-spatial compression algorithm that achieves 31.25 million times compression — reducing what would be 979TB of raw blockchain data for 10 million users down to 32MB. Cryptographic proofs fit inside a single SMS.

**What is the A50 max supply?**
A50 has a hard cap of 50 million tokens. 85% are earned by miners over a 10-year period through Proof-of-Work, with halving every ~1 year. No ICO, no pre-mine.

**Does AURA50 work without internet?**
Yes. AURA50 supports offline transaction queuing. Transactions auto-sync when connectivity returns. The app is optimised for 2G and 3G networks (<50MB/month).

**When is mainnet launching?**
AURA50 mainnet is scheduled for Q2 2026. Join the waitlist at aura50.io for a 5% mining bonus on launch day.

**Is AURA50 open source?**
Yes. The blockchain core is fully open source on GitHub at github.com/aura50/aura50.
